blocks.content: Boyd, the deputy director of the Alchemy Guild, left the Marquisate of Picaras with Monoras.

blocks.speaker: Boyd
blocks.content: The president has instructed us to go to Laviette as soon as possible. If we hurry...
Monoras, whose belly was bloated from all the bribes he had taken, changed direction.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: Let's do this. I'm too heavy right now, so I need to lighten up a bit.
Monoras's gaze was fixed on the gambling city of 'Unlucky.'

blocks.speaker: Boyd
blocks.content: Deputy Director! We don't have time for this!
Boyd shouted, but Monoras's body was already flying towards Unlucky.
Meanwhile, at the Alchemy Guild.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: It's done.
Lethe, who had worked through the night, looked up at the ceiling with a tired face.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: Her head was spinning, and she was overwhelmed with sleepiness.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: ...I have to work.
Although she had sent Boyd, she couldn't leave this matter to someone else.
As she left the president's office in rags, the employees who had just arrived for work bowed their heads.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: President, where are you going?

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: On a business trip. I'm going to Laviette. I've processed all the pending documents, so it should be fine for a while.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: You look very tired. You didn't sleep at all last night, did you? You should get some rest...

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: It's okay. Everyone is working hard. Oh, right, let's stop by the restaurant. I need to get some snacks that Monoras likes.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: Yes. I'll let them know.
The employees liked the president of the Alchemy Guild.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: By the way, you're amazing. I don't mean to be rude, but I don't think I could handle the deputy director's personality.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: Haha, but he's a good guy at heart. As the deputy director, he must have his own difficulties.

blocks.speaker: Employee
blocks.content: It doesn"t seem like it at all.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: Sometimes she wondered if she had amnesia.
Morning in hell.
Flames filled the sky with the smell of sulfur, evaporating the cold snap from the night.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: We've arrived.
The grand castle where the duke lived was one of the largest buildings in Laviette.
Unlike the bleak cityscape, it was neat and, above all, resembled a building from reality.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: I thought you would like it. Now, let's go inside. The duke is waiting for you.
Following Bielman's guidance, they entered the castle, where a luxurious feast was prepared.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Welcome, Yahweh. And your companion.
The duke, who was eating at the head of the table, put down his utensils and smiled.
The old man had a white beard that reached his chest and a kind appearance.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Duke Marguerite.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: The fact that Rian had no special reaction was a clear sign that he was tense.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: He is indeed impressive.
Compared to the army of hell, it felt like facing a commander ranked in the top ten.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Would you like to join me for a meal before we start?
The food, which had just been prepared, was steaming.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Do you usually eat like this?
As Shirone sat down opposite, Rian also quietly took a seat next to him.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: At my age, there's nothing particularly important in the world. But I did put some effort into this.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Even his proficiency in the common language of the continent raised Shirone's wariness towards Marguerite.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: He might not be as strong as a commander, but he was a key figure in the current situation.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I'd like to hear directly about what happened yesterday. The demon you sent used a strange ability.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: It was just entertainment. Do you think I would dare to touch Yahweh with something like that?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: So, what is it?
For the first time, their gazes collided, and the atmosphere rapidly cooled.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Desire, a demonic material I created.
Marguerite took a step back.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: When impure magic is refined with special techniques, you can obtain a special substance that reacts to desire. About 0.1 grams can be extracted per human who falls into hell.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: How many humans would need to be ground up?

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: War advances technology. Humans are desperate, but we can't just sit back and take it. I was convinced this substance would bring victory to the demons. The problem is...
Marguerite adjusted his expression.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: The spiritual realm has been closed. Before Desire could be commercialized and supplied to the army.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: In the end, Seong-eum was right.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: If it were just a matter of destroying the system, it could be fixed, but she used the system. Once inside, she closed it, and it can't be reopened until she is purified.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone's eyes, stripped of pretense, sharpened.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: How long will it take?

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: I don't know. The Alchemy Guild might know, but I didn't feel like asking. Since then, I've been neglecting technological development, just passing the time. Then I heard Yahweh had arrived, so I played a prank.
Marguerite leaned forward.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Now, let me ask. What brings someone busier than me to this hell?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: To destroy the demonic realm.
A catastrophic system, possible only for a high-ranking commander, was tormenting reality.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: I'm thinking of negotiating with the Alchemy Guild. You might need to use your power.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Hmm.
Marguerite stroked his beard.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Of course, the power of the demonic realm is based in hell. If you can't crush the sprout, you'll burn the roots?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Yes. I will purify hell. Even if it means all demons disappear. But if it's you... you might find a better way.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: If this is a threat, it's too much. Even if the spiritual realm is closed, demons are born endlessly. The army of hell, the commanders, will be restored over time.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You want to end it too. The tiresome cycle of reality and the hidden world.
Marguerite's eyes half-closed.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Do you believe in the legendary lesson that not all evil fails to repent?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: He stood up.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Of course, there was such a thing. A long time ago. But don't be mistaken. I'm not someone who has reached such a noble realization. I'm just one of the common demons who hate Yahweh and dislike humans.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Is there no room for negotiation?

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Haha. Do humans negotiate with dogs or pigs?
Rian's eyes glinted with murderous intent.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Don't misunderstand. If you were offended, let's say demons are dogs or pigs. Anyway, we are entirely different species. We can never have the same goals.
Marguerite turned and walked away.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: It was a pleasant breakfast. I hope you achieve everything you want in hell...

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Despite the mocking tone, Shirone responded calmly.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What if you open the spiritual realm?
Marguerite's steps halted.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: ...What do you mean?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Exactly what I said. If you open the spiritual realm that Seong-eum closed, can you help us?
Marguerite turned to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Yahweh lies too. No demon understands the system of hell better than I do. Jin Seong-eum, that woman, will never find freedom until her karma is fulfilled. In other words, opening the spiritual realm is impossible.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I can break the karma chain.
At Shirone's words, Rian stood up and infused his entire body with powerful energy.
Bang! Bang! Bang! Bang!
The chains of Gehenna burst from his chest and struck the ground, causing Marguerite's brow to furrow.
In the next moment, the four chains snapped and were sucked back into Rian's chest.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: ...How?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: How about it? Don't you want to analyze it? It seems there's a hidden code you don't know about.
A system error?
Marguerite, who had been glaring at Shirone with sharp eyes, raised his right hand to his chest.
At the same time, a chain emerged from Rian's solar plexus and entered his grasp.
Ugh!
As Rian exerted his strength again, the heat, like molten iron, was transmitted to Marguerite's hand.
Sizzle!
Even as the sound of burning was heard, Marguerite lowered his gaze to examine the chain.
With a serious expression, he looked at Rian and then threw the chain to the ground, where it stuck with a thud.
Tch!
After confirming that Rian had broken it again, he clasped his hands behind his back and walked to the window.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: This is no ordinary problem.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: The first person that came to Marguerite's mind was the president of the Alchemy Guild.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Lethe must know. Yet she hasn't come. No, the fact that Yahweh reached me first means...

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Is hell also on the verge of collapse?

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: How naive to think that only hell would remain safe in the grand cycle.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Prepare lunch.
With that, Marguerite snapped his fingers at Bielman and moved on.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Open the underground laboratory.
When they arrived at the duke's laboratory, a young succubus, about one meter tall, ran up.
Hello, Duke. Huh?
Seeing Shirone, the succubus's face turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Succubus
blocks.content: Y-Yahweh!
Instinctively, she activated her dream demon abilities, but instead of seduction, she only looked cute.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: He's a guest. Treat him with respect.
As the succubus's abilities were released, she wore a dazed expression while the duke turned to the central device.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: This is Mercede, the manager of the laboratory. This child will assist Yahweh for the time being.
Rian looked around.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: There were over 200 large glass tubes containing human samples.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: In reality, death is 'an unending sleep,' but in hell, death is only purification. If you mean 'an unending sleep,' then yes.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Why did you bring us here?

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Just breaking the chains of Gehenna isn't enough to conclude a system error. First, we'll examine Rian's body. And if possible, Yahweh should assist as well. It will provide useful data.
As Marguerite activated the device, two capsules opened with a whooshing sound.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: You can enter here.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Rian thought of the 200 humans sleeping in the glass tubes, but Shirone moved forward without hesitation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wait, Shirone. It could be a trap.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay.
Shirone didn't stop.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The duke enjoys a battle of wits with his enemies, but he doesn't cling to their weaknesses.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Right?
Marguerite avoided Shirone's gaze and turned to the device.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Please enter. It won't take long.
As Shirone and Rian entered the capsules, the doors closed, and transparent water filled them.
As the water rose to his chin, Rian turned his head, but Shirone remained calm.
The capsules filled with water, and five seconds later, the water level quickly receded.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: Scan complete. Transmitting to the Underworld screen.
Mercede reported.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Hmm.
Marguerite examined a rectangular steel plate shallowly filled with blood-red liquid.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: This, this is...!
Numbers that had never been seen in any demon were engraved on the red plate.
